subject: [PATCH v3 1/4] sunrpc: add per-netns per-procedure call counts to svc_stat

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch adds per-network namespace (netns) and per-procedure call counts to the sunrpc service statistics. It introduces a new pointer array in struct svc_stat to store these counts, which are managed by two helper functions: svc_stat_alloc_counts() and svc_stat_free_counts(). The patch also updates the nfsd_net_init() and nfsd_net_exit() functions to allocate and free these counts as needed. This change is necessary for an upcoming netlink stats interface that requires namespace-scoped statistics.
